title: unknown_file.jar
body:
# UNKNOWN_FILE.JAR
**something wanders where it shouldn't in a world where you don't belong**

![One of this mods entities, Moon Eater, stalking the player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94b5ee6e29b040a9d49513a39bfbaec4e432109c.png)

unknown_file.jar is a RANDOM progression horror mod that slowly corrupts your world (it isn't really slow lmao), while you uncover the secrets of its dark past. This mod sends you back to the alpha versions of minecraft, but things feel really odd. People who don't belong join, world corrupts itself slowly while it tries to kick you out. (I put it as random progression because in current versions of the mod you can get pretty much any heavy event after Shadow joins)

Some things on the mod still don't work as intended and/or will be given use in the future. Its recomended that you don't play with any other mod that changes terrain generation or any other horror mod for the best experience. Its on you though! 
WARNING:
This mod can:
- erase your worlds
- ban you from worlds
- create popups
- forcefully crash or close the game

CREDITS:
- Alpha/Classic textures from Golden Days Alpha
- Modern Beta for the testing of the no hunger stuff
- Some assets from Scott Cawthon games (might change in future versions)
- nicopatty for the HERE I COME remix used for Corrupter's WIP fight, go check it out [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SoWYTMVgub4&list=PLIQuaYleU-n50EEO-gH-z5r_xNs-I9MDK&index=2):D 

NOW ON CURSEFORGE! CHECK IT OUT:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unknown-file-jar
